title: Integrate help drawer into index.html
description: Wire up the help-drawer.html drawer UI into index.html so clicking the ? button opens a slide-in help drawer. The drawer logic and CSS must be extracted into assets/js/help-drawer.js and added to assets/css/style.css respectively. The standalone help-drawer.html file is left as-is.
success_criteria: index.html references assets/js/help-drawer.js via script tag
index.html contains an element with class 'drawer'
index.html contains an element with class 'overlay'
help-btn is wired to call HelpDrawer.open (onclick in index.html or addEventListener in help-drawer.js)
help-drawer.js handles Escape key to close drawer
help-drawer.js implements Tab focus trap inside drawer
notes: sl-icon-button onclick uses window.HelpDrawer.open() matching the settings-btn pattern. playwright-cli click does not trigger onclick on Shoelace custom elements (shadow DOM boundary); JS .click() is used in browser_eval.py instead.
